calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Barbara Anscher; Clerk: JIRoque; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Cindy Lee, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendants, Hector Erica Amaro and Ronald James Jenkins, are present.
Attorney, Jenna Musselman Yott, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the Judgment pursuant to Stipulation, for the premises located on 66 Camellia, San Francisco, CA 94112.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-02-2009 is vacated.
